faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: To reset your password, click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link. The link expires in 24 hours.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers. All transactions are encrypted and secure. You can save multiple payment methods in your account.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Subscription > Cancel Plan. Your access continues until the end of the billing period. You can reactivate anytime without losing your data.

faqs.question: How do I export my data?
faqs.answer: Navigate to Settings > Data > Export. Choose your format (CSV, JSON, or PDF) and select what data to include. Large exports are emailed as a download link.

faqs.question: What are the system requirements?
faqs.answer: Our web app works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For mobile, we support iOS 14+ and Android 10+. Minimum screen resolution is 1024x768.

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: Email support@example.com or use the in-app chat. Premium users get priority phone support. Response time is typically under 4 hours during business hours.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my plan mid-cycle?
faqs.answer: Yes, upgrades take effect immediately. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of the billing period. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Auth. Choose between SMS or authenticator app. Scan the QR code with your app and enter the verification code to enable.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for annual plans. Monthly plans can be canceled anytime but are non-refundable. Contact billing@example.com for refund requests.

faqs.question: How do I invite team members?
faqs.answer: Go to Team > Invite Members. Enter email addresses and assign roles (Admin, Editor, Viewer). Invitees receive an email with instructions to join your workspace.
